transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigator. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I want to know if Dr. Patel at Lakeview Clinic is covered under my plan.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, let me pull that up. Can you give me your member ID?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I see you're on the Silver Advantage PPO. Dr. Patel is listed as an in-network podiatrist at Lakeview Clinic.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Podiatrist? He's actually my cardiologist, I've been seeing him for two years.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sorry about that, let me recheck. It looks like there's a duplicate provider entry under that name. One moment please.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Found it now. Dr. Anil Patel, cardiology, at Lakeview Clinic is in-network under your Silver Advantage plan.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Good, that's a relief. Will my usual copay still be twenty dollars?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, twenty dollars for specialist visits with your current plan.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Perfect, thanks for sorting that out.
